Math.title: Mathematics + Code
Math.subtitle: The differentiator: interactive visualisations and math notation rendered in the browser.
Math.intro: This section is optional and modular. It combines math notation rendering (KaTeX) with interactive visualisations to show how I apply mathematics to software.
Math.descentDescription: Gradient descent minimises a function by stepping against its gradient. Tweak the learning rate (η) and the starting point to watch it converge — or diverge.
Math.fourierTitle: Fourier series of a square wave
Math.fourierDescription: A square wave is approximated by summing odd harmonics. Increase the number of terms and watch the sum converge to the target signal (with Gibbs ringing at the jumps).
Math.clickHint: click the chart to set x₀
Math.lorenzDescription: Chaotic dynamical system described by three ODEs. Change σ or ρ to explore the bifurcation: below ρ ≈ 24.7 the system converges to a fixed point; above, chaos emerges.
Math.nnDescription: 2→8→1 network (ReLU + sigmoid). Left-click to add class-A points, right-click for class B. The network trains in real time and draws the live decision boundary.
Math.nnHint: Click the canvas to add points — training starts automatically.

Footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
